jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Craftsvilla
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Craftsvilla! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Srinagar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Craftsvilla:
Craftsvilla is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Craftsvilla!
